completion_summary: Defined canonical task-specific RL observation contract 0.1 covering ordered public values/masks, core-operation progress, global affordance mask, campaign formulas, bounds and reset semantics. Verified canonical hashes and exact Gym-space/reset-vector parity for all four formal RL tasks; ruff and mypy pass, 17 observation/replay tests pass.
scope: Freeze a task-specific semantic RL observation contract with canonical hashing and verify its segment order, bounds, reset semantics, and exact compatibility with all core-task training observation spaces without modifying the claimed training runner.
